title: agropyron scabrifolium
intro: Agropyron scabrifolium, also known as roughleaf wheatgrass or rough wheat grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Agropyron scabrifolium include reducing inflammation and promoting healing, as well as supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to treat a variety of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
